commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an installable tokenomics plugin that records model.usage diagnostics into a local spend ledger, serves a Gateway diagnostics report, and updates plugin metadata, docs, shrinkwrap, and the root lockfile.

PR surface: Source +1361, Tests +1030, Docs +192, Config +55, Other +6. Total +2644 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. The PR service depends on ctx.internalDiagnostics?.onEvent, while current main only grants that capability to trusted diagnostics exporter services, so this plugin can start its route without recording spend.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is required because the remaining blockers are product/API/security direction and contributor real behavior proof, not one narrow automated repair.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
